---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the framework, prompt flow, compatibility, or contributor experience
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem to solve

What is missing or weak today?

## Proposed improvement

Describe the feature or change you want.

## Why it matters

How would this improve usability, discoverability, safety, or contribution?

## Scope

- Prompt behavior
- Memory workflow
- Report output
- Cross-agent compatibility
- Documentation
- Community onboarding
- Other

## Additional context

Anything else contributors should know.
